description: Staged implementation policy for subsystem bring-up.

subsystems.goal: Execute original startup and hardware-test code with remapped MMIO and shadow memory.
allowed_shortcuts: shadow text/video memory instead of final VDP implementation
forbidden_shortcuts: rebuild startup control flow in handwritten gameplay logic

subsystems.goal: Accept sound-facing calls and expose expected ready/busy semantics before real sound exists.
forbidden_shortcuts: hide command failures without reporting them

subsystems.goal: Preserve writes, readback, and text-layer state before final VDP tile mapping is complete.
Preserve sprite/object writes and decoded parts before final VDP sprite output is complete.
Provide a stable Genesis-to-arcade input mapping and software DIP interface.
